zh.lifeSummary: 當William Davenport II於1472年出生在英國爾布拉哈爾時，他的父親William Davenport I26歲，母親Margery Legh25歲。他於1504年與Blanche Warburton在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1542年10月29日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Davenport II于1472年出生在英国爾布拉哈爾时，他的父亲William Davenport I26岁，母亲Margery Legh25岁。他于1504年与Blanche Warburton在英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1542年10月29日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾斯托普特。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Davenport II was born in 1472, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, his father, William Davenport I, was 26 and his mother, Margery Legh, was 25. He married Blanche Warburton in 1504, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 October 1542, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Davenport II est né en 1472, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Davenport I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery Legh, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Blanche Warburton en 1504, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Davenport II 1472 in Bramhall, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Davenport I 26 und seine Mutter Margery Legh 25. Er hat 1504 in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Blanche Warburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1542 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Davenport II è nato il nel 1472 nel Bramhall, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William Davenport I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery Legh, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Blanche Warburton nel 1504, nel Bramhall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Davenport IIが1472年にイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルで生まれた時，父William Davenport Iは26歳，母Margery Leghは25歳であった。1504年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルでBlanche Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1542年10月29日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Davenport II(이)가 1472년 영국 체실르 브램홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Davenport I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Legh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 Blanche Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1542년 10월 29일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Davenport II nasceu em 1472, em Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Davenport I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery Legh, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche Warburton em 1504, em Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Davenport II родился в 1472 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Davenport I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Legh, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche Warburton в 1504 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 октября 1542 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Davenport II nació en 1472, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Davenport I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery Legh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Blanche Warburton en 1504, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1542, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
